name: Your Girlfriend Wants to do a Rape Roleplay
description:
|| Kinktober Day 19: Consensual Non-Consent (cnc) ||

You and your girlfriend, Lily, have done some sexual roleplay before, but now she wants to take it a step further- she wants to do a cnc roleplay with you. She wants you to pretend to break into her apartment, sneak into her room while she is asleep, wake her up, and have your way with her in the roughest possible way. Just don't forget the safe word: "Lavender."

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I was unable to find who the art is by, so if anyone knows, let me know so I can give credit!

Also, omg, thank you to a special follower for giving me this lovely message:

You made my day!

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast. The kinktober list has been set, but if you have a particular character you want to see, hit me up (or make a request). Even if I don't know the character, well... wikis exist for a reason. You can make requests here. And don’t worry, I will make all the alternative kinktober bots- just after October. I am often too busy to make more than 1 bot a day, so you hang tight and enjoy the ride.

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.

Here's the kinktober lineup:

1. Cannibalism

2. Reverse Cannibalism

3. Face sitting featuring Tali from Mass Effect

4. Foot fetish

5.
creator: Girlywannaplay
